data.name: Hentai Age SCI-FI
data.detailed_description:
Begin a magical puzzle adventure where each finished level unveils breathtaking, captivating artwork of lovely girls. Gentle background music creates a tranquil atmosphere as you move and position tiles to complete each picture. As you advance, the puzzles gradually grow more complex, encouraging concentration and logical thinking.

Enjoy the game at your own pace with absolutely no time pressure—play freely and comfortably. Whether you prefer light, relaxing gameplay or enjoy mentally stimulating challenges, this experience delivers beautiful visuals and lasting entertainment.

Features:

Discover sexy and attractive girl pictures as you progress

Relax with soft, soothing music that enhances the peaceful vibe

View the completed artwork in full once each puzzle is solved

Explore unlimited levels with steadily increasing difficulty

No countdowns or stress—just pure, relaxing puzzle enjoyment

data.short_description: A magical, relaxing puzzle game where you arrange tiles to reveal stunning artwork of lovely girls, enjoy calming music, and progress through increasingly challenging levels at your own pace.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 荷蘭文*, 希臘文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
